name: HWR_VLTR_SKILL_ANALYSIS_VL
query: SELECT PROJECT.PROJECT_ID, PROJECT.PROJECT_DESCRIPTION, PROFILE.HCM_PERSON_ID, PROJECT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE FROM HWR_VLTR_PROJECT_VL PROJECT INNER JOIN HWR_VLTR_VOL_PROJ_REL_VL PROFILE ON PROJECT.PROJECT_ID = PROFILE.PROJECT_ID AND PROJECT.STATE = 'ORA_COMPLETED' AND PROFILE.STATUS='VOLUNTEERED'
